207.reason: [When encountering a single '&' or '|', the lexer correctly records an error, but it does not advance the current position `curPos` after detecting the invalid symbol. This causes the next call to `next()` to reprocess the same character, potentially leading to infinite loops or missed errors. Additionally, the character following the single '&' or '|' may be misinterpreted because `curPos` was not advanced past the erroneous symbol.]
